channel.title: Badly Formatted Feed
channel.description: A feed with various formatting problems for testing error handling

item.title: Article With Bad Date
item.description: This item has an unparseable publication date.

item.title: Article Missing GUID
item.description: This item has no guid element at all.

item.title: Article With Unescaped HTML & Entities
item.description: This has bold and and "smart quotes" & ampersands.
This item is missing its title element entirely.
This item has an empty title.
